record.field: Mautic is the leading open-source marketing automation platform, giving organizations enterprise-grade campaign tooling without vendor lock-in.

Mautic is the leading open-source marketing automation platform, giving organizations enterprise-grade campaign tooling without vendor lock-in.

Built on PHP and the Symfony framework, Mautic lets teams capture, segment, score and nurture contacts across multiple channels from a single self-hosted application. It covers the full lifecycle from landing pages and forms to multi-step automated campaigns, with complete ownership of contact data and the freedom to customize and extend every part of the stack. Backed by Acquia and a large global community, it is the privacy-focused alternative to proprietary suites like HubSpot or Marketo.

Key features
  • Visual, multi-step campaign builder for automated drip and trigger-based workflows
  • Unlimited contact segmentation, lead scoring and behavioral tracking
  • Multi-channel messaging: email, SMS/text, web push notifications and social
  • Built-in landing page and form builder with dynamic content
  • Email campaign management with A/B testing and deliverability reporting
  • Extensible plugin architecture and REST API for CRM and tooling integrations
Best for

Marketing teams, agencies and businesses that want full data ownership and a self-hosted alternative to SaaS marketing clouds, and that have the technical resources to run and maintain a PHP/MySQL application.

field.name: tag_ids
field.eval: [Command.set([ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_self_hosted'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_automation'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_workflow'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_crm'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_email'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_analytics'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_communication'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_marketing')])]

record.field: services: mysql: image: mysql:8.0 command: --default-authentication-plugin=mysql_native_password restart: unless-stopped environment: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: {{ mysql_root_password }} MYSQL_DATABASE: {{ mautic_db_database }} MYSQL_USER: {{ mautic_db_user }} MYSQL_PASSWORD: {{ mautic_db_password }} volumes: - ./mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql healthcheck: test: - CMD - mysqladmin - ping - -h - localhost interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5 container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_mysql' networks: - internal mautic: image: mautic/mautic:5.1.1-apache restart: unless-stopped depends_on: mysql: condition: service_healthy ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:80' environment: - DOCKER_MAUTIC_ROLE=mautic_web - DOCKER_MAUTIC_RUN_MIGRATIONS=true - MAUTIC_DB_HOST={{ mautic_db_host }} - MAUTIC_DB_PORT={{ mautic_db_port }} - MAUTIC_DB_DATABASE={{ mautic_db_database }} - MAUTIC_DB_USER={{ mautic_db_user }} - MAUTIC_DB_PASSWORD={{ mautic_db_password }} - MAUTIC_URL={{ mautic_url }} - MAUTIC_TRUSTED_PROXIES={{ mautic_trusted_proxies }} - MAUTIC_MESSENGER_DSN_EMAIL={{ mautic_messenger_dsn_email }} - MAUTIC_MESSENGER_DSN_HIT={{ mautic_messenger_dsn_hit }} - PHP_INI_DATE_TIMEZONE={{ php_ini_date_timezone }} - PHP_MEMORY_LIMIT={{ php_memory_limit }} volumes: - ./mautic_data:/var/www/html entrypoint: - /bin/sh - -c - chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html && /entrypoint.sh apache2-foreground healthcheck: test: - CMD-SHELL - test -f /var/www/html/config/local.php || exit 1 interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 3 start_period: 300s container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network mautic-cron: image: mautic/mautic:5.1.1-apache restart: unless-stopped depends_on: mautic: condition: service_healthy environment: - DOCKER_MAUTIC_ROLE=mautic_cron - MAUTIC_DB_HOST={{ mautic_db_host }} - MAUTIC_DB_PORT={{ mautic_db_port }} - MAUTIC_DB_DATABASE={{ mautic_db_database }} - MAUTIC_DB_USER={{ mautic_db_user }} - MAUTIC_DB_PASSWORD={{ mautic_db_password }} - MAUTIC_URL={{ mautic_url }} - PHP_INI_DATE_TIMEZONE={{ php_ini_date_timezone }} volumes: - ./mautic_data:/var/www/html container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_mautic_cron' networks: - internal mautic-worker: image: mautic/mautic:5.1.1-apache restart: unless-stopped depends_on: mautic: condition: service_healthy deploy: resources: limits: memory: 512M environment: - DOCKER_MAUTIC_ROLE=mautic_worker - DOCKER_MAUTIC_WORKERS_CONSUME_EMAIL=2 - DOCKER_MAUTIC_WORKERS_CONSUME_HIT=2 - DOCKER_MAUTIC_WORKERS_CONSUME_FAILED=2 - MAUTIC_DB_HOST={{ mautic_db_host }} - MAUTIC_DB_PORT={{ mautic_db_port }} - MAUTIC_DB_DATABASE={{ mautic_db_database }} - MAUTIC_DB_USER={{ mautic_db_user }} - MAUTIC_DB_PASSWORD={{ mautic_db_password }} - MAUTIC_URL={{ mautic_url }} - MAUTIC_MESSENGER_DSN_EMAIL={{ mautic_messenger_dsn_email }} - MAUTIC_MESSENGER_DSN_HIT={{ mautic_messenger_dsn_hit }} - PHP_INI_DATE_TIMEZONE={{ php_ini_date_timezone }} volumes: - ./mautic_data:/var/www/html container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_mautic_worker' networks: - internal phpmyadmin: image: phpmyadmin/phpmyadmin restart: unless-stopped depends_on: mysql: condition: service_healthy environment: PMA_HOST: mysql PMA_PORT: 3306 UPLOAD_LIMIT: 64M ports: - 80 container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_phpmyadmin' networks: - internal networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" # Dump de la base de APLICACIÓN. Clave: usa MYSQL_PWD (env), NUNCA `-p` — con `-p` y # password vacío (apps con MYSQL_RANDOM_ROOT_PASSWORD) mysql espera un prompt por stdin # y CUELGA. Prefiere el usuario de app (MYSQL_USER/PASSWORD/DATABASE); cae a root solo si # no hay usuario de app (excluye schemas de sistema, que romperían la auth al restaurar). docker compose exec -T mysql sh -c ' # MariaDB 11+ renombró mysqldump→mariadb-dump y mysql→mariadb: detectamos el binario. DUMP=$(command -v mysqldump || command -v mariadb-dump); CLI=$(command -v mysql || command -v mariadb) if [ -n "${MYSQL_USER:-}" ] && [ -n "${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-}" ] && [ -n "${MYSQL_DATABASE:-}" ]; then export MYSQL_PWD="$MYSQL_PASSWORD" exec "$DUMP" -u"$MYSQL_USER" --single-transaction --databases "$MYSQL_DATABASE" fi export MYSQL_PWD="${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-}" DBS=$("$CLI" -uroot -N -e "SHOW DATABASES" | grep -Ev "^(mysql|sys|information_schema|performance_schema)$") [ -z "$DBS" ] && { echo "REVISAR: sin bases de aplicacion para respaldar" >&2; exit 0; } exec "$DUMP" -uroot --single-transaction --databases $DBS ' > "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.sql" echo "mysqldump OK ($(wc -c < "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.sql") bytes)"

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" docker compose up -d mysql # Readiness + restore en UN exec (credenciales DENTRO del contenedor, con MYSQL_PWD → # jamás cuelga esperando un prompt de password). Prefiere el usuario de app; cae a root. docker compose exec -T mysql sh -c ' CLI=$(command -v mysql || command -v mariadb) if [ -n "${MYSQL_USER:-}" ] && [ -n "${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-}" ]; then U="$MYSQL_USER"; export MYSQL_PWD="$MYSQL_PASSWORD"; else U=root; export MYSQL_PWD="${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-}"; fi for i in $(seq 1 60); do "$CLI" -u"$U" -e "SELECT 1" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 2; done exec "$CLI" -u"$U" ' < "$RESTORE_DATA_DIR/db.sql" echo "restore MySQL OK"
